title: PRD: Real-time cursor presence
text:
# PRD — Real-time cursor presence
Product area: Real-time Collaboration
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request real-time cursor presence. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Real-time Collaboration area.

## Proposed solution
Implement real-time cursor presence with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Real-time Collaboration-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
